//: Sniffler-only tsconfig. Sniffler reads baseUrl + paths directly from this file (it does NOT follow `extends`), so we mirror the project's absolute-import setup (tsconfig.json baseUrl: "src" / babel module-resolver root: "./src") with an explicit wildcard mapping. baseUrl is the repo root (".." relative to .sniffler/) so resolved paths match Sniffler's repo-root-relative graph node keys, and "*": ["src/*"] maps bare `src/`-relative specifiers like `Scenes/Login/Login`, `store/GlobalStore`, `system/...` onto files under src/. Keep in sync with tsconfig.json's baseUrl if it ever changes.
